name: rules
tagline: Reference doc explaining how the Codex Rules plugin auto-injects project rule files and its env-var toggles.
verdict: Clean, low-risk reference skill: pure documentation, no shell/network calls, no credential access, no remote instruction-following. Only minor gaps are hygiene nits (no negative-trigger guidance, no version signal in frontmatter) — nothing that endangers a user who installs it.

highlights.summary: No explicit 'do not use when...' guidance; minor omission for a narrowly-scoped reference skill, low practical impact.
Frontmatter has no version or changelog field, so consumers can't tell if the injection behavior it documents has drifted from a newer plugin release.
